entities.name: Apolin

attributes.role: demon involved in conjuration to send a teacher

entities.raw_quote: The magician commands the demons Apolin, Maraloth and Berith to send yet another demon as a teacher

entities.name: Maraloth

attributes.role: demon involved in conjuration to send a teacher

entities.raw_quote: The magician commands the demons Apoluring, Maraloth and Berith to send yet another demon as a teacher

entities.name: Berith

attributes.role: demon involved in conjuration to send a teacher

entities.raw_quote: The magician commands the demons Apolin, Maraloth and Berith to send yet another demon as a teacher

entities.name: Haram

attributes.purpose: to reveal hidden treasure in sleep

entities.raw_quote: Haram, a benign spirit, may come to me in my enough sleep and enkindle my heart and my mind, that I may know how to find a treasure

entities.name: Astaroth
entities.raw_quote: writes the name of the boy and the name Astaroth on the knife handle

entities.name: Michael, Gabriel and Raphael
entities.raw_quote: conjures the names themselves, that they may send the angels Michael, Gabriel and Raphael to reveal whatever information he is seeking.

entities.name: Experiment no. 30

attributes.method: anointing joints with oil and powder

entities.raw_quote: He anoints four joints of the boy’s left hand with olive oil and with this powder, in alternation, until the boy’s fingers shine like a mirror.

entities.name: Bowl divination

attributes.method: gazing at fluid in a vessel

entities.raw_quote: one should take a bronze bowl or saucer and fill it with water, then add green olive oil, recite an incantation over it

entities.name: Experiment no. 28

attributes.method: spatulamancy using a ram's shoulder blade

entities.raw_quote: the master anoints the right shoulder blade of a ram with olive oil and puts it beneath the handle of a knife.

entities.name: olive oil
entities.raw_quote: He anoints four joints of the boy’s left hand with olive oil

entities.name: resin ash
entities.raw_quote: obtains a powder by burning resin and collecting the ash from the bottom of a basin

entities.name: black hen feather

attributes.source: left wing of a black hen

entities.raw_quote: writing on the vessel with a feather from the left wing of a black hen

entities.name: bird blood
entities.raw_quote: The markings on this cloth are to be made with the blood of a bird, perhaps a hoopoe

entities.name: bronze bowl
entities.raw_quote: one should take a bronze bowl or saucer and fill it with water

entities.name: knife with horn handle
entities.raw_quote: scrapes the boy’s right thumbnail, using a knife with a handle of black or white horn

summary: This chunk details various divinatory rituals involving child mediums using fingernails, vessels, bones, and sleep to reveal information or find treasures. It describes specific ingredients like olive oil and bird blood, as well as the conjuration of spirits such as Apolin, Maraloth, and Berith.
key_passages: The magician commands the demons Apolin, Maraloth and Berith to send yet another demon as a teacher
the master conjures certain demon princes to come in the form of black men and appear in the boy’s nail.
Haram, a benign spirit, may come to me in my sleep and enkindle my heart and my mind, that I may know how to find a treasure
The master conjures the demons (again as often as needed) to come and appear to the boy in the forms of the thieves.
the master anoints the right shoulder blade of a ram with olive oil and puts it beneath the handle of a knife.
